nasb.text: Now all his servants passed on beside him, all the Cherethites, all the Pelethites and all the Gittites, six hundred men who had come with him from Gath, passed on before the king.

esv.text: And all his servants passed by him, and all the Cherethites, and all the Pelethites, and all the six hundred Gittites who had followed him from Gath, passed on before the king.

cnv.text: 王所有的臣僕都從王的身邊走過去，所有的基利提人、比利提人和迦特人，就是從迦特來跟從王的六百人，都從王面前走過去。

ccb.text: 跟随他的人都走到前面去了，包括基利提人、比利提人以及从迦特来跟随他的六百人。
